apps.name: Cypher Drive
apps.notes: Cardputer ADV HID payload launcher build.

apps.name: Cypher Chat
apps.notes: Cardputer ADV secure-only mesh chat build. Mesh protocol 0x02 uses AES-256-GCM and does not interoperate with plaintext or HMAC-only firmware.

apps.name: Cardputer Games
apps.notes: Standalone Cardputer arcade catalog.

apps.name: Cardputer MPC
apps.notes: MPC-style groovebox with SD-loaded samples and sequencing. Press Shift+Q to return to Cypher OS.

apps.name: Cardputer Tarot
apps.notes: Offline tarot pull, journal, history, and study deck app. Back/backtick from the main menu returns to Cypher OS.

apps.name: Cypher Desk
apps.notes: Offline Cardputer ADV utility suite with notes, calculator, checklist, converters, and scratchpad.

apps.name: Flock You
apps.notes: Cardputer ADV WiFi/BLE detector build with return-to-launcher support.

apps.name: WireTap-32 Cardputer
apps.notes: Cardputer ADV EXT bench build with return-to-launcher support.

apps.name: Star Trader
apps.notes: Cardputer Game OS import. Deep ship-console trading sim with markets, routes, cargo, crew, upgrades, and route events.

apps.name: Dungeon Courier
apps.notes: Cardputer Game OS import. Deep contract delivery RPG with town boards, package integrity, supplies, route choices, and perks.

apps.name: Tiny Wasteland
apps.notes: Cardputer Game OS import. Deep survival road drama with regions, camp care, scavenging risk, party state, trade, and vehicle pressure.

apps.name: Pocket Kingdom
apps.notes: Cardputer Game OS import. Deep seasonal kingdom ledger with workers, buildings, laws, advisors, crises, and yearly reports.

apps.name: Monster Ranch
apps.notes: Cardputer Game OS import. Deep weekly ranch sim with creature care, training, expeditions, facilities, tournaments, and ranch events.

apps.name: Guildmaster
apps.notes: Cardputer Game OS import. Deep quest desk sim with generated contracts, class parties, staged results, hall upgrades, and rivals.

apps.name: Haunted Radio
apps.notes: Cardputer Game OS import. Deep fictional station mystery with tuning, fake signals, decode tools, cases, logs, and power routing.

apps.name: Cyberdeck RPG
apps.notes: Cardputer Game OS import. Deep offline fake node-crawl with job board, simulated nodes, tools, recovered files, market, and reps.

apps.name: Pocket Detective
apps.notes: Cardputer Game OS import. Deep notebook mystery game with cases, maps, interviews, clue book, clue comparison, and accusations.

apps.name: Cryptid Ranger
apps.notes: Cardputer Game OS import. Deep ethical field research game with zones, gear, patrols, evidence tracking, guide entries, and reports.

apps.name: Cyber Ranger
apps.notes: Cardputer Game OS import. Deep fictional cyber-wilderness investigation with park zones, fake anomaly boards, deck commands, guide, cases, and gear.

apps.name: Star Trail Ranch
apps.notes: Cardputer Game OS import. Deep space creature transport sim with contracts, habitats, route decay, market supplies, and discovery logs.

apps.name: Waste Guild
apps.notes: Cardputer Game OS import. Deep settlement command sim with base pressure, expeditions, team roles, staged results, facilities, and threats.

apps.name: Signal Rat
apps.notes: Cardputer Game OS import. Deep flagship fictional cyberdeck RPG with safehouse, faction jobs, simulated nodes, recovered files, and deck upgrades.

apps.name: Poke-Trail
apps.notes: Cardputer Game OS import. Original creature trail RPG with travel, battles, catching, audio, and region progression.
